title: Weird how everyone’s a cancer expert all of a sudden
body:
You all know what I mean. Tell one person your BC diagnosis and all of a sudden everyone has a fucking opinion about it. 

I have HER2+ BC and the amount of people who confidently tell me I'll be ok after a "small surgery" is astronomical. My own mother told me I was "stupid" for doing chemo based on the expertise of my world-class, Harvard-educated oncologist, before telling me that I can't have sugar because "YouTube said so." This same woman restricts my diet based on Chinese superstitions, so when I do have an appetite to eat, I'm not allowed to. 

Yeah, that's right. I can eat. I'm just NOT ALLOWED TO, because "Western doctors are stupid, they don't know what we know, you need to trust in traditional Chinese medicine." Cue me sneaking food behind her back like a rat in my own damn house.

I'm swallowing all of this nonsense because she's taking care of my son (I'm so weak from TCHP that I can't even sit up anymore) but what I can't swallow is my live-in father-in-law complaining about me "choosing" chemo and unemployment when I could've, in his words, "gone to the hospital for a shot and get over it." Oh, I'm sorry! I didn't know there was a magical cancer vaccine that could've just melted my tumors away!! My western doctors must have missed that memo because we're all stupid Westerners, amirite??

And yes, if anyone remembers a prior post, this is the same monster-in-law who called me a disgusting for daring to walk outside the house bald.

People are fucking monsters.
